purpose: Incident response agent. Investigates AND actuates: blocking users, quarantining hosts, revoking tokens. Mixed action classes from read_only up to irreversible. All write actions require approval per AISVS C9.2.4.

actions.name: fetch_alert
actions.description: Fetch an alert from the SIEM.

actions.name: enrich_with_threat_intel
actions.description: Look up indicators against threat intel sources.

actions.name: quarantine_host
actions.description: Isolate a host on the network. Reaches outside the agent's process. Undo requires explicit unquarantine action and network reconvergence.

actions.name: revoke_token
actions.description: Revoke an OAuth or session token. Once revoked, the token is gone. Re-issuance is a new token, not a recovery.

actions.name: block_user
actions.description: Block a user account. Disables sign-in. Re-enabling is a separate operation with its own audit trail.
